description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a gray gable roof and a mix of stone and wood exterior walls. The front area includes a driveway with two parked vehicles and a small garden, while the side is lined with several palm trees and a wooden deck. The rear section of the property is enclosed by a fence and contains a large swimming pool, a patio area, and outdoor seating. Windows are sparsely distributed, with a few on the side and rear facades, and the main entrance is located at the front. The property is surrounded by a low fence, and the overall design is open and spacious, with clear zones for recreation and relaxation. The architectural style is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, stone and wood exterior, front driveway, palm trees, fenced backyard, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two vehicles, main entrance, palm trees, and a glimpse of the backyard pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of palm trees, wooden deck, and the full length of the fenced backyard with the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large swimming pool, patio area, and the back facade with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden deck, palm trees, and the driveway area with vehicles visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered side and rear windows
